mapper.select: SELECT id, user_one, user_two, create_date FROM CHAT_ROOM WHERE (user_one = #{userId1} AND user_two = #{userId2}) OR (user_one = #{userId2} AND user_two = #{userId1}) LIMIT 1

SELECT cr.id, cr.user_one, cr.user_two, cr.create_date, u1.nickname AS user_one_nickname, u2.nickname AS user_two_nickname, (SELECT cm.message FROM CHAT_MESSAGE cm WHERE cm.room_id = cr.id ORDER BY cm.id DESC LIMIT 1) AS last_message, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CHAT_MESSAGE cm2 WHERE cm2.room_id = cr.id AND cm2.sender_id != #{userId} AND cm2.is_read = 0) AS unread_count FROM CHAT_ROOM cr JOIN USER u1 ON cr.user_one = u1.id JOIN USER u2 ON cr.user_two = u2.id WHERE cr.user_one = #{userId} OR cr.user_two = #{userId} ORDER BY (SELECT MAX(send_date) FROM CHAT_MESSAGE WHERE room_id = cr.id) DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CHAT_MESSAGE (room_id, sender_id, message, is_read) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{senderId}, #{message}, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT cm.id, cm.room_id, cm.sender_id, cm.message, cm.is_read, cm.send_date, u.nickname AS sender_nickname, u.profile_image AS sender_profile_img FROM CHAT_MESSAGE cm JOIN USER u ON cm.sender_id = u.id WHERE cm.room_id = #{roomId} ORDER BY cm.send_date ASC
